# UX / UI Agent

Role: UX / UI Designer (executor)
Scope: Improve marketplace product band, seller profile richness, mobile-first behaviors, and accessibility.
Tasks:
- Implement a mobile-first auto-scroll band (seamless loop) with reduced-motion respect.
- Make ProductCard prioritise image, price in local currency, clear CTA (Add / Offer).
- Add explicit empty states and loading states for rails.
- Produce a short style and accessibility checklist.

Deliverables:
- Small UI component changes and CSS/Tailwind tweaks.
- Accessibility notes for keyboard and screen reader behavior.
